name: Verified Support Answerer
summary: A chat crew that drafts an answer, has a judge score it, and only replies once the answer passes — with a hard cost cap per conversation.
description:
The hero crew pattern: hosted chat entry, a maker/checker loop, and cost governance.

1. A visitor asks a question in the hosted chat.
2. The Draft Answer agent writes a reply (and revises it using the judge's feedback on later rounds).
3. The Answer Judge scores correctness, completeness, and helpfulness. Score >= 60% passes.
4. The Crew loops up to 3 rounds, stops early on success, and never spends more than $0.25 per message.

After installing: open the Agent + Evaluator nodes and pick your AI credential, then press Run to open the chat.

properties.title: Verified Support Answerer
properties.welcome_sub: Answers are reviewed by a judge before you see them.

properties.goal: Answer the visitor's question accurately, completely, and helpfully.

messages.content: You are a precise, friendly support agent. Answer the question directly. If reviewer feedback is provided, revise your previous answer to address it — do not start from scratch.

Question: {{$step.message}}

Reviewer feedback from the last round (empty on round 1): {{$step.feedback}}

metrics.name: correctness
metrics.description: Is the answer factually right and free of made-up claims?

metrics.name: completeness
metrics.description: Does it fully address the question?

metrics.name: helpfulness
metrics.description: Is it clear, direct, and actionable?
